reconciliation.P4_Silver_Guest: Present (Single leaf remaining in black pot)

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current biological presence. P2 is absent. P4 is the only remaining occupant of the black pot, which appears to be a single-leaf cutting or remnant.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil. No germination or growth detected.
plant_audit.P2: Absent. Pot contains only substrate and a plant marker.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos leaf remains stable; White Rabbit anchor is present and stationary.
plant_audit.P4: Single leaf remains. Shows signs of chlorosis or thinning; structural integrity is declining.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently damp/dark; no signs of surface cracking.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P4 pot (Intervention).

temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: P2 marker becomes visible in the yellow pot; P4 leaf remains static.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Introduction of white cable/wire near P1/P4 area.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Lighting shift; P4 leaf appears to lose turgor/droop.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: P4 leaf remains in a state of terminal decline; no new growth.

visual_health_inference.P4: Critical/Declining. The single leaf is the only remaining biological indicator and shows signs of senescence.

anomalies: Eggshell fragments used as soil amendment/top dressing in P4.
White cable/wire intrusion in the workspace.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. The Pothos (P3) remains the only stable element. The 'Silver Guest' (P4) is failing, likely due to insufficient root development or environmental stress. The yellow pot (P1) and the black pot (P2) are effectively barren, suggesting a failure of the initial botanical project. The presence of eggshells indicates an attempt at nutrient supplementation, which has not yielded visible recovery.
